Grounding Datasets Visualizer

Random samples from each grounding dataset converted to WebDataset tar format. Coordinates in <point> tags are 0-999 normalized; red dots show their pixel locations.
30 samples  |  avg 1.4 points/image  |  avg 139 caption chars

00073.tar/000734540 · 3 pts · 270 chars
Tennessee is allowing restaurants to open at 50% capacity. Here, <point x="263" y="682">a waitress</point> wears <point x="253" y="574">rubber gloves</point> and <point x="282" y="487">a mask</point> at Puckett's Grocery & Restaurant in Franklin, just outside Nashville.
00073.tar/000735053 · 2 pts · 253 chars
<point x="267" y="464">Wisconsin hunters</point> no longer must carry and attach carcass tags to <point x="582" y="631">deer</point> and turkeys they shoot, but they still must register their kills by 5 p.m. the next day or face a possible $343.50 fine.
